emptyState:
Edit your video by chatting.

"Add a zoom at 0:03"
"Zoom in more when I click the button"
"Cut the first 2 seconds"
notInstalledBody:
The bundled Claude agent binary was not found.
Run npm install in the project folder and restart the app.
notAuthenticatedBody:
The AI assistant uses your Claude subscription.
Open a terminal, run claude, then type /login — or save an Anthropic API key below.
When you're done, press Check again.
autoEditPrompt: Auto-edit this video. BEFORE touching anything, use ask_user (one call) to confirm three things with me: (1) zoom style — subtle / dynamic / aggressive, (2) target length — keep as is, or tighten it with cuts and speed-ups (offer concrete options based on the video duration), (3) caption language — Korean / English / original language / none. Then watch the video (frames + transcript), and edit to my picks: varied-depth zooms following the story, cut dead air, speed-ups where appropriate, captions in the chosen language. Finish with a short summary of changes.
understandPrompt: First, fully understand this video: watch frames across the whole timeline and read the narration transcript if there is one. Then report back a structured briefing — what the video shows, the flow, and key moments with timestamps. Do NOT edit anything yet. If anything is unclear or you would otherwise have to guess (audience, tone, what matters most), ask me with the ask_user tool.

question.expired: This question expired after a restart.

cliNotAuthenticatedBody:
Open a terminal, run {{login}}, and finish signing in.
When you're done, press Check again.
apiKeyOptionalPlaceholder: {{name}} API key (optional — instead of signing in)
noApiKeyBody:
Paste your {{name}} API key in the field under the model picker.
Get one from {{source}}.
